title: cinnamomum burmanni var. kiamis
intro: Cinnamomum burmanni var. kiamis, also known as Kiamis or Indonesian cinnamon, is a variety of the Cinnamomum burmannii plant, a type of evergreen tree native to Indonesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Kiamis include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, Kiamis is prepared as an essential oil or herbal tea, and its bark and leaves can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and infusible powders.
